job.title: Systems & Networks Architect
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Systems & Networks Architect in Cavaillon, you design reference architectures and ensure technical consistency of our clients' infrastructures.
mission.1: Design reference system and network architectures
mission.2: Define technical standards and best practices
mission.4: Participate in technology choices and tender responses
mission.6: Write architecture documents and technical roadmaps
profile.1: Master's degree in informatique ou réseaux
profile.2: 6 to 12 years of experience with strong infrastructure architecture expertise
profile.3: Proficiency in network technologies (Cisco, SD-WAN, BGP, MPLS)
profile.5: Cisco, CCIE, or AWS certifications are a plus
